channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok ‘Meet the Crew: Fraux’ trailer
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS4
  • PS5
  • Switch 2

Pactbearer to The Devil.

Publisher Cygames and developer Cygames Osaka have released a new “Meet the Crew” trailer for Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok, introducing new playable character Fraux (voiced by Kelly Baskin in English, Azumi Asakura in Japanese).

Granblue Fantasy: Relink – Endless Ragnarok is due out for PlayStation 5, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, and PC via Steam on July 9.

Watch the trailer below.

Meet the Crew: Fraux

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/granblue-fantasy-relink-endless-ragnarok-meet-the-crew-fraux-trailer
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Viractal coming to Switch 2, Switch on September 30
item.content:encoded:
• Switch
  • Switch 2

Switch 2 version available physically in Japan.

Sting will release Switch 2 and Switch versions of board game RPG Viractal on September 30 worldwide and October 1 in Japan, the developer announced.

Viractal first launched in Early Access for PC via Steam on September 19, 2025, followed by a full release on January 26, 2026.

In Japan, the Switch 2 version of Viractal will be available both physically and digitally. Pricing is as follows:

  • Physical Edition
    • Switch 2 (Nintendo Switch 2 Edition, game card) – 4,950 yen
  • Digital Edition
    • Switch – 3,960 yen
    • Switch 2 – 4,950 yen
    • Switch 2 Upgrade Pack – 990 yen

Here is an overview of the game, via Sting:

■ About

Viractal is a board game-style RPG featuring procedurally generated maps that change with every playthrough, as well as randomized enemy and event placements that deliver a high level of replayability. Set in the mysterious world of “Viractalia,” players use card decks and dice to build strategies and forge their own path through adventure.

A challenging adventure awaits, where success depends on strategic deck-building and making the right decisions in every situation. The game also supports online multiplayer. By planning strategies and working together with friends, players can enjoy a cooperative experience that offers a different kind of excitement and fun from solo play.

Experience the endlessly replayable world of the board game RPG Viractal, where dice and cards shape every adventure, on Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch.

Since the release of the Steam version, Viractal has continued to receive regular updates, including the addition of new characters and stages, as well as feature improvements based on player feedback.

The game currently holds a “Very Positive” rating on Steam user reviews and continues to be enjoyed by many players. Ongoing post-launch updates are also planned for the Nintendo Switch 2 and Nintendo Switch versions.

■ Game Overview

The Beginning of This Game

As your hazy consciousness begins to clear, you awaken in a mysterious room. Illuminated by candles and dim lighting, a lone board game rests before you. As the boundary between reality and fantasy slowly begins to fade, the heroes’ adventure begins.

Freely Explore Procedurally Generated Sandbox Fields

Every adventure begins with a single roll of the dice. Featuring procedurally generated maps that change with every playthrough, along with randomized enemy and event placements, Viractal offers a high level of replayability.

“What will happen next?” “What treasures will you discover?” Experience the excitement of never knowing what awaits around the corner.

A Unique Fusion of Card Battles and Board Game Gameplay

Use a wide variety of cards to defeat your enemies! Collect countless cards and create your own unique deck and combinations.

Powerful Bosses Await at the End of Every Stage

You can even engage the boss before it fully awakens. Strike first and claim a swift victory!

Online Multiplayer and Voice Chat Support

Team up with friends and tackle challenges together or pretend to cooperate while secretly looking out for yourself…The unique “Devil’s Whisper” deception system may end up destroying friendships before you even realize it!?

Advanced Audio Design Made Easy with 3D Spatial Audio & Communication Middleware

Viractal fully utilizes CRI ADX and CRI TeleXus to deliver a deeply immersive gameplay experience. In addition, by making full use of Yamaha’s virtual 3D audio solution “Sound xR Core,” the game achieves highly immersive spatial audio for headphone users.

In the “Spring of Cards” area, ambient sounds such as flowing water are rendered in Ambisonics format to create an immersive atmosphere. During battles, placing the listener at the character’s position allows for powerful and dynamic 3D spatial audio.
image.pngimage.png

Voice chat is implemented using CRI TeleXus. In the “Devil’s Whisper” system, forming a contract can even alter the sound of a player’s voice reflecting their actions through voice chat itself.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/viractal-coming-to-switch-2-switch-on-september-30
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: CAVE Interactive shoot ’em up bundle Muchi Muchi Pork! & PinkSweets Boosted announced for PS5, Switch, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch

Due out on October 1.

City Connection has announced Muchi Muchi Pork! & PinkSweets Boosted, a shoot ’em up bundle feature CAVE Interactive-developed titles Muchi Muchi Pork! and PinkSweets: Ibara Sorekara. It will launch for PlayStation 5, Switch, and PC via Steam on October 1. In Japan, physical editions will be available for PlayStation 5 and Switch for 6,490 yen. The digital edition will cost 5,390 yen.

Update 05/29/26: Amazon France listings reveal that clear River Games will release the physical edition in the west.

Here is an overview o the game, via its Steam page:

About

Hardcore yet cute Danmaku shooting makes a grand comeback!

  • Muchi Muchi Pork! – Ride rogue machines and turn all of humanity into pigs!
  • PinkSweets: Ibara Sorekara – Sisters charge into battle to rescue their mother imprisoned on a remote island.

Two of the most unique titles in CAVE’s legendary shoot-’em-up lineup are back.

Master Various Versions and Game Modes Across Both Titles

  • Muchi Muchi Pork! – Rogue machines run wild on Earth! Turn humans into pigs one after another! Blast through enemies and use the massive “Lard Attack” to rack up a mountain of score items!
    • Included Variations and Game Modes
      • Version 1.0 – The original version that debuted in arcades.
      • Version 1.01 – A balanced mode with buffed player ships for a more accessible experience.
      • Arrange Mode – Trigger “Fever Mode” with Lard Attacks! Fill the entire screen with score items.
      • MANPUKU Mode – A high-difficulty mode featuring “Revenge Fire” (suicide bullets).
      • HARAHARA Mode – Start the game directly from the increased difficulty of the 2nd Loop.
  • PinkSweets: Ibara Sorekara – Rescue Mom from a forced marriage! The five sisters launch a massive assault on the wedding venue. Block enemy fire with your Shield, then unleash the “Rose Cracker” after charging to wipe out both enemies and bullets!
    • Included Variations and Game Modes
      • Version 1.0 – The original version that debuted in arcades.
      • Version 1.01 – A balanced mode with buffed player ships for a more accessible experience.
      • Arrange Mode – The new “Hadou Cannon” weapon accelerates the score attack to new heights.
      • HARDER Mode – A high-difficulty mode where destroyed enemies release massive amounts of Revenge Fire.
      • EXTENDED Mode – An ultra-hard mode with increased 1st Loop difficulty and access to the 2nd Loop.
      • S-ATTACK Mode – A score attack mode where you play Stage 6 with infinite lives and a strict time limit.

All-New Arrangements! “Boosted” with Rich Options

Featuring a completely new arranged background music soundtrack. Switch between the original and arranged tracks to create your own custom setlist!

Featured composers include Daisuke Matsumoto, Yosuke Yasui, Hagane, Sean Bialo.

Also supports Online Rankings and Replay Data recording, allowing you to save and share your best.

Watch the announcement trailer below. Visit the official website here.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/cave-interactive-shoot-em-up-bundle-muchi-muchi-pork-pinksweets-boosted-announced-for-ps5-switch-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Japanese-inspired sci-fi fantasy RPG Gravastar announced for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox

Featuring a fast-paced conditional-turn-based battle system inspired by 2D arcade fighting games.

Seattle-based developer Studio Atma has announced Gravastar, a science-fiction fantasy Japanese-style turn-based RPG over 10 years in development. It will be available for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC. A release date was not announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Studio Atma:

About

Gravastar is a science-fiction fantasy JRPG (Japanese-style role-playing game) for PC and consoles that combines a nostalgic JRPG aesthetic with a unique and fast-paced conditional-turn-based battle system inspired by 2D arcade fighting games. The battle system in Gravastar is set apart from traditional turn-based JRPGs by its attack-combo input system. Alter the flow of battle, master your character’s movesets, build enormous combos, and string together chains to dispatch your foes.

Story

You are Baird, an orphan boy on the exoplanet Aethera, who has just violently discovered that he is a Spectre, a rare being with power tied to the stars. Begin your quest, meet companions, and learn to harness the power of the stars on your journey to save Aethera from a fanatic zealot, hell-bent on plunging the Universe into darkness. Only then, can you truly fulfill your destiny.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Key Features

  • Story-driven campaign with over 15 hours of classic JRPG gameplay.
  • Unleash the power of the stars to perform powerful spells and devastating combos on your enemies in a unique and fast-paced conditional-turn-based battle system inspired by 2D arcade fighting games.
  • Join Baird and a cast of five playable companions as they race to save Aethera from darkness.
  • Uncover the secrets of Aethera’s rich history as you adventure through five sprawling continents.
  • Stylistic 3D animation in the style of traditional 2D animation and hand-painted textures combine to recreate the nostalgic JRPG aesthetic of the 16- and 32-bit eras with a modern high-definition facelift.
  • Developed by industry-veteran designers, artists, and grass-fed programmers who write only the most efficient and optimized code. :)

Watch the announcement trailer below. View a set of screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/japanese-inspired-sci-fi-fantasy-rpg-gravastar-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series-switch-2-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Ironwing Valiant: Record of Astera second closed alpha test announced
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Latest look at the Japanese-inspired mecha action RPG.

Tiger Team has released a new trailer for Japanese-inspired mecha action RPG Ironwing Valiant: Record of Astera announcing that a second closed alpha test is coming soon.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Ironwing Valiant: Record of Astera is a fast-paced, mecha action JRPG game with shooting and melee mechanics, mech customization, companion customization, real-time with pause command abilities in combat, and a compelling storyline and characters. Taking the guise of a young mecha pilot named Reinhardt, you will battle through sleepy villages, imposing fortress cities, and war-scarred industrial centers, fully customize your Valiant (our term for mecha) to fit your playstyle. The game features full parts customization (head, arms, legs, core, minor components), a large selection of unique melee, ranged, and axillary weapons, companion and party customization, multiple enemy types (Infantry, armored vehicles, mechs, elite enemies, and more) and a JRPG-style storyline.

Key Features

  • Combat – Master the many arts of Mecha combat—fight in melee and ranged combat with a diverse arsenal of weapons that include: cannons, missile launchers, swords, axes, shields, and much more! Two distinct archetypes will define your role on the battlefield: soar through the skies and fight in the air, or generalize and become the jack of all trades, able to react to whatever any opponent throws your way!
  • Customization – Build your dream mecha—customize to your heart’s content! Swap out the Heads, Core, Arms, Legs, Power pack, and more components to make your perfect build with its own, unique playstyle.
  • Narrative – Ironwing Valiant: Record of Astera‘s story takes place in the world of Euridia, in the small mountain Kingdom of Astera. The world and story of Ironwing Valiant: Record of Astera is based off of Chinese and Korean mythology and The Romance of The Three Kingdoms novel! Defend your homeland and fight for your small kingdom’s independence against the Gundrian Empire!
  • Characters – Follow the efforts a young Valiant pilot named Reinhardt and his friends as they struggle to defend their homeland from the Empire of Gundria! Bring one of your three combat companions into the fray, customize their loadouts and abilities, and grow your bond with them to increase their battlefield prowess! Hold dear your friends, cherish moments of peace, and fight as one!
  • Explore a Beautiful World – Venture through Astera! From the imposing Fortress City of Suhl, to the Sixteen Heavenly peaks of the Lonely Mountains, the quiet village of Brunheim, and the bustling city of Voclau! Start your journey in the sleepy village of Brunheim, a Ghibli-esque village of warm-hearted people, rolling country hills, windmills that dot these blessed lands and a divine wind rolls across the heavens.

Watch a new trailer below.

Closed Alpha 2 Playtest Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/ironwing-valiant-record-of-astera-second-closed-alpha-test-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Dwarven tactical RPG Runesmith announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Hold on to your beards!

Terahard Studios has announced Runesmith, a dwarven tactical RPG that fuses “rune-forging, tavern brawls, and catastrophic status-effect combinations.” It will be available for PC via Steam. A release date was not announced.

“Runesmith is a dream come true as it’s the company’s first true RPG, something that I’ve wanted to build in all the 13 years of Terahard’s existence,” said Terahard Studios CEO Aris Tsevrenis in a press release. “Fantasy dwarves are loved for a lot of different reasons and their deep lore makes them extra interesting. Being a D&D player for many years, it was something that I always wanted to try. Runesmith is a mixture of our humor, crafting and how both can affect combat in interesting ways.”

  • ❮
  • ❯

Here is an overview of the game, via Terahard Studios:

About

Live your life as a fantasy dwarf! Hammer runes into mythril, drink enough ale to frighten a priest, and solve your problems the traditional dwarven way: excessive violence in both dungeons and taverns.

Gather a band of equally questionable adventurers and hunt down the all-powerful villain threatening the world. Not to save it, mind you, but because the bastard still owes you coin. No one cheats a dwarf and lives long enough to tell the tale.

Key Features

  • Rune-Smithing Crafting System – Forge weapons, armor, trinkets, and deeply irresponsible magical combinations through an extensive rune engraving system. Experiment with rune interactions that can chain or accidentally create problems significantly larger than the original problem.
  • Live Like a Proper Dwarf – Drink at taverns, brawl with strangers, accept questionable jobs, improve your forge, and wake up every morning fueled by spite, greed and industrial-grade ale.
  • A Story Driven by Petty Revenge – The world may be ending, but priorities matter. Chase down an all-powerful summoner not because he threatens existence, but because he skipped out on paying a dwarf.
  • You’ve Played Turn-Based RPGs Before and Triggered Status Effects, But Not Like This – Every fight is a sandbox of unstable rune interactions where simple decisions can chain into devastating combos, catastrophic accidents, or spiral into complete tavern-grade stupidity. Add poison to a harmless fog, and suddenly the battlefield violates several dwarven safety regulations. Drink while drunk, and become hammered before ending up unconscious on the floor, questioning your ancestors. The combat system rewards creativity, recklessness, and the occasional alcoholism.
  • A Fantasy World Full of Idiots and Monsters – Explore towns, mines, ruins, taverns, dungeons, and ancient horrors while dealing with merchants, priests, nobles, and adventurers who somehow make the monsters seem reasonable.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/dwarven-tactical-rpg-runesmith-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Survival horror RPG THERMOCLINE announced for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PS4, Xbox One, Switch, and PC
item.content:encoded:
Publisher SEMICOLON and developer Decent Treatment have announced survival horror RPG THERMOCLINE for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Switch, and PC (Steam, itch.io). It will launch first for PC via Steam this winter as a completely free release, followed by the other platforms at a later date.

Here is an overview of the game, via SEMICOLON:

About

A blizzard rages. Lone survivor, you are stranded upon a frigid corpse-planet. They seek your warmth, sucking Soul from the shadows. And tonight, the wind is your closest semblance of a friend.

Key Features

  • Explore the dead planet C9 CRPSE-19, and uncover the mysteries of the planet’s abandoned infrastructure.
  • Character-driven psychological horror narrative.
  • Skillful turn-based battles where you dismantle terrifying grafted monstrosities. An expansive, challenging take on the classic style—with modern sensibilities.
  • Manage fuel and temperature in a hostile, freezing wasteland.
  • Beautiful, hand-drawn environments which forbode your impending doom.
  • Original soundtrack by Fear & Hunger composer Chilly Makes Music.
  • 100 percent free, done for the love of the artform. We aren’t collecting data on you and we don’t plan to have any microtransactions. We don’t even know how to do that stuff.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/survival-horror-rpg-thermocline-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series-switch-2-ps4-xbox-one-switch-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Emery Hearts launches September 2
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Explore a vibrant voxel world in this retro-inspired action RPG.

Action RPG Emery Hearts will launch for PC via Steam on September 2, publisher and developer Indie Dev Hell, and publisher Shinyuden announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Step into the shoes of Lug, an ordinary boy with the power to shape the fate of humans and machines in a world on the brink. A retro-inspired action JRPG where you explore a vibrant voxel world, battle deadly mechanoids, solve puzzles, and uncover a story of legacy, mystery, and heart.

Story

In a world on the brink of extinction, where the last human colonies endure the relentless assault of robots corrupted by an ancient virus. Lug, a young villager, fights to protect his people in a land ruled by despair. After a mysterious earthquake, his fate is forever changed when he discovers powerful energy crystals that connect him to the consciousness of his long-lost mother and to the Vital Thread, the force that binds all life on the planet.

Traverse a stunning voxel-art world brimming with life and secrets, engage in fast-paced real-time battles against relentless mechanoids, and tackle clever puzzles that challenge both your wits and courage. Every choice will drag you closer to a defining dilemma: save the robots at the cost of all organic life, or forge a fragile balance where both can coexist.

The fate of the world rests on whether Lug can break the cycle of hatred and choose a new future for all.

Key Features

  • Fast-Paced and Varied Combat – Real-time combat where you can use different weapons, skills, magic and items.
  • Upgrade Your Character – Find different weapons that you can upgrade and evolve, amulets, and all kinds of items that will make you more powerful.
  • Classic RPG Puzzles – Every true warrior must strengthen both their body and mind.
  • Semilinear World With Gated Progression – Gain new powers to progress through different areas.

The fate of the planet is in your hands. Can you change it?

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/emery-hearts-launches-september-2
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Edge of Memories demo launches June 15 for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Play the first chapter of the story.

Publisher Nacon and developer Midgar Studio will release a demo for action RPG Edge of Memories for PC via Steam on June 15.

Here is an overview of the demo, via Nacon:

The demo opens with the game’s first chapter, where Eline awakens on an idyllic beach along the Estfalian Coast and encounters Ysoris, a mysterious wanderer equipped with strange prosthetics. Despite her suspicions, Eline agrees to escort him to the nearest village, where circumstances lead them to join forces in order to rescue hunters who have been abducted by monsters born from the Corrosion. Players will be able to experience the foundations of the combat system by unlocking Eline’s first combos and Ysoris’ abilities, while also discovering the enemy weakness system and learning how to craft potions at campsites.

At the end of the quest, players will face the game’s first boss and uncover Eline’s hidden power: her transformation into the Black Beast, granting her incredible strength for a short period of time. Once transformed, Eline can deal massive damage and execute her enemies with a spectacular finishing blow… even though she remembers none of it afterward.

The demo includes part of the game’s first chapter and offers nearly two hours of content. Players will be able to experience the beginning of the main quest, explore the game’s first area—the Estfalian Coast—and take on a boss encounter.

Edge of Memories is due out for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam in 2026.

Watch the trailer below.

Demo Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/edge-of-memories-demo-launches-june-15-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
